pageContext.name: The Big Lebowski
pageContext.description: 'That rug really tied the room together.'  Sideshow and Vice Press present the The Big Lebowski Fine Art Lithograph Print by Tracie Ching!  This 18 x 24 unframed Lithograph print has an edition size of 200 and comes with a stamp of authenticity on the reverse. Printed on Absolute Naturalis 270gsm archival paper.  A must-have for fans of The Big Lebowski!
